payload.summary: All 9 waves complete: 845 pass / 0 fail, tsc clean, validate exit 0 on final branch state. 36 commits on epic/phase-1-core-loop, pushed. 8 canonical workflows shipped, 8 ccpm command groups retired, importer proven on real speed-count-game data. Exit test (lab migration + 1 feature + 1 bug + cross-tool resume) runs post-merge with Jim gates. PR opens next; merge is Jim only.
